$out.description: The surface sink: wire the base color into Color (required) and, optionally, per-particle/per-vertex transforms. Render Mode picks how alpha composites - blending (Additivity Factor 0=over..1=additive), alphaHash (stochastic), alphaTest (hard cutout at Alpha Threshold), or opaque; Additivity Factor shows only in blending and Alpha Threshold in every mode but opaque. Geometry picks the primitive or a custom mesh asset; for a particle emitter, Sort Every N re-sorts particles back-to-front every N frames (0 = off).
$out.label: Surface

$spawn.description: The spawn sink: values wired here are written once, at particle birth (initial position, lifetime and any declared attributes). Try GPU Simulation asks both the live preview and the exporter to also compile this behavior graph to run on the GPU (WebGL2) - a best-effort request, not a guarantee: a graph using a JS-only construct falls back to the CPU simulation for this emitter, and the GPU version only actually runs on a device that supports it. Expected Capacity sizes this emitter's particle buffers - a CPU-simulated emitter starts at this count and grows as needed, while a GPU-simulated one is capped at exactly this count with no growth; either way, changing it rebuilds the emitter and restarts playback.
$spawn.label: Spawn

$update.description: The update sink: values wired here are written every simulation step (moving position, updating attributes over the particle's life).
$update.label: Update

add-scaled-vector.description: Adds a value scaled by a factor: out = a + b * scale.
add-scaled-vector.label: Add Scaled Vector

align-to-velocity.description: A rotation (mat3) that turns one local axis to point along Velocity and another to face the camera - orient a mesh to both face its direction of travel and billboard toward the camera.
align-to-velocity.label: Align To Velocity

ambient-shading.description: Shades a color with indirect-only diffuse lighting (ambient + light probe + hemisphere).
ambient-shading.label: Ambient Shading

animated-texture.description: Cross-fades a sprite sheet: previous/current frame UVs and a blend factor from a (wrapped) ratio.
animated-texture.label: Animated Texture

binary-op.description: Applies a two-input operation (add, multiply, min, pow, step, ...) to same-typed values.
binary-op.label: Binary Operation

box-collision.description: Bounces particles off an axis-aligned box, with radius, restitution and friction.
box-collision.label: Box Collision

blend.description: Composites two colors with a chosen blend mode.
blend.label: Blend

camera-distance.description: View-space distance from the camera to the particle.
camera-distance.label: Distance to Camera

clamp.description: Clamps a value between a low and high bound (defaults saturate to [0, 1]).
clamp.label: Clamp

color-ramp.description: Maps a scalar 0..1 input through a color gradient, emitting an RGBA color.
color-ramp.label: Color Ramp

combine.description: Assembles float components into a vector.
combine.label: Combine

combine-color.description: Combines an RGB color and an alpha into a single RGBA color.
combine-color.label: Combine Color

combine-mat2.description: Assembles a mat2 from two column vectors (column-major).
combine-mat2.label: Combine Mat2

combine-mat3.description: Assembles a mat3 from three column vectors (column-major).
combine-mat3.label: Combine Mat3

combine-mat4.description: Assembles a mat4 from four column vectors (column-major).
combine-mat4.label: Combine Mat4

compose-transform.description: Builds a mat4 from position, rotation (mat3) and scale (T * R * S).
compose-transform.label: Compose Transform

constant.description: A constant value of the node's type, baked in at compile time.
constant.label: Constant

curl-noise.description: Divergence-free vector noise (2D/3D), for fluid-like particle flow.
curl-noise.label: Curl Noise

description.behavior: The simulation timestep of the current update, in seconds.
description.render: Time elapsed since the previous frame, in seconds.

determinant.description: The scalar determinant of a matrix.
determinant.label: Determinant

dissolve.description: Erodes alpha with a noise field advancing over the particle lifetime.
dissolve.label: Dissolve

dot.description: The scalar dot product of two vectors.
dot.label: Dot

euler-to-rotation.description: Builds a mat3 rotation from Euler angles (radians, XYZ order).
euler-to-rotation.label: Euler to Rotation

firework.description: Seeds an outward burst velocity in a random cone direction around an axis.
firework.label: Firework

fresnel.description: A camera-correct rim/edge factor derived from a world-space surface normal.
fresnel.label: Fresnel

gravity.description: Applies a constant acceleration to velocity.
gravity.label: Gravity

hsl-adjust.description: Shifts an RGBA color's hue, saturation and lightness in HSL space.
hsl-adjust.label: HSL Adjust

initial-velocity.description: Seeds velocity as a direction scaled by a random speed.
initial-velocity.label: Initial Velocity

integrate.description: Advances a value by a rate over dt (Euler); e.g. rotation by torque.
integrate.label: Integrate

integrate-motion.description: Advances position by a velocity input over dt (Euler); bind its output to position.
integrate-motion.label: Integrate Motion

inverse-view-matrix.description: The inverse of the view matrix (view -> world space), as a mat4 (render-only).
inverse-view-matrix.label: Inverse View Matrix

inverse-world-matrix.description: The inverse of the object's world matrix (world => object space), as a mat4.
inverse-world-matrix.label: Inverse World Matrix

lambert-shading.description: Shades a color with diffuse Lambert lighting (direct + indirect + shadows).
lambert-shading.label: Lambert Shading

length.description: The Euclidean length of a vector.
length.label: Length

lifetime.description: Seeds a random particle lifetime from a [min, max] range.
lifetime.label: Lifetime

lightness-blending-mask.description: Fades a color by its own brightness (dark pixels drop out).
lightness-blending-mask.label: Lightness Blending Mask

look-at-camera.description: A camera-facing rotation (mat3) - the billboard orientation, as a node. Axis locks to a cylindrical billboard that only rotates around that axis.
look-at-camera.label: Look At Camera

matrix-to-mat3.description: The rotation/scale part of a mat4 (its upper-left 3x3 block), as a mat3.
matrix-to-mat3.label: Matrix To Mat3

mix.description: Linearly interpolates between two values by a factor t.
mix.label: Mix

noise.description: Coherent noise (fBm) sampled at a 1D/2D/3D coordinate, returning a scalar [-1, 1].
noise.label: Noise

normal-map.description: Interprets a sampled color as a tangent-space normal map, in world space.
normal-map.label: Normal Map

normal-matrix.description: The normal matrix transpose(inverse(mat3(model))) from a model mat4.
normal-matrix.label: Normal Matrix

object-angular-velocity.description: The object's world-space torque (axis * radians/second), as a vec3.
object-angular-velocity.label: Object Torque

object-velocity.description: The object's world-space linear velocity (units/second), as a vec3.
object-velocity.label: Object Velocity

plane-collision.description: Bounces particles off an infinite plane, with radius, restitution and friction.
plane-collision.label: Plane Collision

point-force.description: Accelerates particles toward or away from a point, with a falloff mode.
point-force.label: Point Force

point-velocity.description: The velocity of a point offset from the object's origin: velocity + cross(torque, offset).
point-velocity.label: Point Velocity

ramp.description: Remaps a scalar 0..1 input through an editable curve (smooth or sharp anchors).
ramp.label: Curve

random.description: A fresh per-particle random in [0, 1); store into an attribute to persist it.
random.label: Random

description.behavior: Reads a named per-particle attribute buffer as its value output (the CPU-side reader; e.g. the current velocity fed to a force).
description.render: Reads a named per-particle attribute (written by a behavior store-attribute) as its value output.

description.behavior: Reads a named per-particle attribute buffer, split straight into its float components (x/y/z/w up to its width) - the CPU-side reader, fused with a split.
description.render: Reads a named per-particle attribute (written by a behavior store-attribute), split straight into its float components (x/y/z/w up to its width) - fused with a split.

read-state.description: Reads a chosen per-particle builtin (position, age, lifetime, or dt) as a float.
read-state.label: Read State

remap.description: Linearly remaps a value from an input range to an output range.
remap.label: Remap

rotate-uv.description: Rotates UVs about their center by a live angle.
rotate-uv.label: Rotate UV

rotation-matrix.description: Builds a mat3 rotation about an axis by an angle (Rodrigues' formula).
rotation-matrix.label: Rotation Matrix

scale-matrix.description: Builds a mat3 diagonal scale from a per-axis scale vector.
scale-matrix.label: Scale Matrix

smoothstep.description: Smooth Hermite interpolation of a value between two edges.
smoothstep.label: Smoothstep

spawn-box.description: Scatters particles inside (or over the surface of) an axis-aligned box.
spawn-box.label: Spawn Box

spawn-cone.description: Scatters particles inside (or on the surface of) a cone about an axis.
spawn-cone.label: Spawn Cone

spawn-cylinder.description: Scatters particles inside (or on the lateral surface of) a cylinder about an axis.
spawn-cylinder.label: Spawn Cylinder

spawn-disc.description: Scatters particles over a flat ring (inner/outer radius) about an axis.
spawn-disc.label: Spawn Disc

spawn-sphere.description: Scatters particles inside or on the surface of a sphere.
spawn-sphere.label: Spawn Sphere

spawn-torus.description: Scatters particles inside (or on the surface of) a torus about an axis.
spawn-torus.label: Spawn Torus

sphere-collision.description: Bounces particles off a solid sphere, with radius, restitution and friction.
sphere-collision.label: Sphere Collision

spherical-clip.description: Multiplies alpha by a soft circular mask centered on the UV.
spherical-clip.label: Spherical Clip

spherical-normal.description: A rounded surface normal from the billboard UV (flat particle shaded as a sphere).
spherical-normal.label: Spherical Normal

split.description: Splits a vector into its float components.
split.label: Split

split-color.description: Splits an RGBA color into its RGB color and alpha.
split-color.label: Split Color

split-mat2.description: Splits a mat2 into its two column vectors (column-major).
split-mat2.label: Split Mat2

split-mat3.description: Splits a mat3 into its three column vectors (column-major).
split-mat3.label: Split Mat3

split-mat4.description: Splits a mat4 into its four column vectors (column-major).
split-mat4.label: Split Mat4

store-attribute.description: Writes its value input into a named per-particle attribute buffer, read on the GPU by read-attribute.
store-attribute.label: Store Attribute

surface-normal.description: The particle's world-space surface normal, for lighting, fresnel, and normal masks.
surface-normal.label: Surface Normal

texture.description: Samples a named texture asset at the given UV (defaulting to the particle UV); the sampler is an external uniform bound by the host.
texture.label: Texture

time.description: The global clock, in seconds since start.
time.label: Time

description.behavior: A named, runtime-tunable value exposed as a live kernel binding (driven live or by a timeline). The behavior half of Timeline Value.
description.render: A named, runtime-tunable value exposed as a shader uniform (driven live or by a timeline). Unlike Constant it is not baked and costs a slot.

transform-direction.description: Transforms a direction by a mat3 (linear, ignores translation).
transform-direction.label: Transform Direction

transform-point.description: Transforms a point by a mat4 (applies translation); returns a vec3.
transform-point.label: Transform Point

translation-matrix.description: Builds a mat4 affine translation from an offset vector.
translation-matrix.label: Translation Matrix

turbulence.description: Layers several octaves of value noise (fBm) into velocity.
turbulence.label: Turbulence

unary-op.description: Applies a one-input function (abs, sqrt, sin, normalize, ...) to a value.
unary-op.label: Unary Operation

view-matrix.description: The camera's world -> view matrix, as a mat4 (render-only).
view-matrix.label: View Matrix

vortex.description: Swirls particles tangentially around an axis, with optional inward pull.
vortex.label: Vortex

world-matrix.description: The object's world (model) matrix, as a mat4.
world-matrix.label: World Matrix
